potential_missing.source_sentence: This simple microwave has a switch to select full or half power, a numeric keypad to input the cooking time, a start/stop button, and an alphanumeric display.
Press Start and the food is cooked for the given time.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: This simple microwave has a switch to select full or half power, a numeric keypad to input the cooking time, a start/stop button, and an alphanumeric display.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall have an alphanumeric display.
